title: Papyrux
description: A slightly different take on how some items and mobs in minecraft should look like
body:
This resource pack offers a transformative experience by revamping the UI, most items, and mobs, while maintaining a semblance of the classic vanilla style.

Recommended to use Optifine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) Compatibility: To fully experience the enhanced textures.

For example, the appearance of potions reflects their level. The texture changes depending on the enhancement used:
- _The shape of the bottle and the colour of the cap depends on whether the potion is upgraded with redstone or glowstone._

## List of modified textures:
### Entities
- Cow, creeper, enderman, ghast, iron golem, pig, sheep, skeleton, slime, spider, squid, villager (only skin), wither, zombie, blaze, chicken, endermite, exp orb, silverfish
### Blocks
- Chest and Ender Chest
- All beds
- Crafting Table
- End portal frame
### Items
- All Pickaxes, Axes, Swords, Shovels, Hoes, Armor, Potions and bottles
- Most of the ingredients (Animated e-pealr, e-eye, heart of the sea)
- All Food (animated pufferfish <3)
### Other
- UI, panorama background
- Enchant tint


# Preview
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dc3KmPRi/images/1dec3f6cab973bb22603c4895a5a014feb2049ba.png)
_Note: Some items feature animations and not all items are captured in this image._

![UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dc3KmPRi/images/91ad522ce48d50eb5f17da4787c5540102558a8f.png)
_Note: The UI does not support mods._
